description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a two-tone color scheme of matte black and light gray. The body is constructed with a robust receiver, a prominent detachable box magazine, and a collapsible or adjustable stock with a skeletonized buttplate. The handguard is equipped with a rail system for mounting accessories, and the barrel is relatively short, ending in a visible muzzle brake. Flip-up iron sights are mounted on the top rail, providing basic aiming capability. The pistol grip and foregrip are ergonomically shaped for improved handling, making this weapon suitable for close-quarters urban environments.
description: A modern, two-tone tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, short barrel, rail system, and flip-up iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, collapsible stock, detachable magazine, and muzzle brake.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, muzzle brake, and narrow profile of the handguard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the ejection port, magazine, and stock details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock's buttplate and the alignment of the iron sights.
